tool.name: generate_pdf_report
tool.description:
Render a branded PDF pentest report from tracker findings.
Pulls findings from tracer, sorts by severity + CVSS, composes cover page, exec summary, methodology, findings index, detailed finding cards with title/severity/CVSS/OWASP/compliance/description/impact/technical analysis/PoC/remediation. Color-coded severity. Requires reportlab.

parameter.name: executive_summary
parameter.description: Freeform exec summary. Auto-generated if empty.
